snippet.title: Gehra Hua - Audio | Dhurandhar | Ranveer Singh, Sara Arjun, Shashwat Sachdev, Arijit Singh
snippet.description:
Dive into the full depth of emotions with lyrics that bring every feeling to life.

👉 Subscribe to Saregama Music: https://bit.ly/3FkAS0W

Credits:
Composed, Produced and arranged by Shashwat Sachdev 
Singer: Arijit Singh, Armaan Khan 
Lyrics: Irshad Kamil

Lyrics:
Tu agar meri ye hawaayein teri 
Tu agar meri saari raahein teri 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Tu agar meri ye ujaale tere 
Tu agar meri dil hawaale tere 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Betaab sa mohabbbat ka tu inqalab hai 
Mera jahan teri baahon mein khaab khaab hai 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Rang aashiqui 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Dariya dua 
Gehra hua 
Tera hua 
Tu agar meri ye hawaayein teri 
Tu agar meri saari raahein teri 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Palke jhapakta hai aasma 
Laakhon farishton ki hai tu jaan 
Wo poochte hain rehti kahan 
Meri baahon mein rehti unko bataa 
Palke jhapakta hai aasma 
Usne bhi tujhsa dekha kahan 
Hai raunakein wahan tu hai jahan 
Meri baahon mein rehna yehi hai dua 
Tu agar meri hai fasaana tera 
Tu agar meri toh zamaana tera 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Betaab sa mohabbbat ka tu inqalab hai 
Mera jahaan teri baahon mein khaab khaab hai 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Rang aashiqui 
Gehra hua 
Tera hua 
Tu agar meri ye hawaayein teri 
Tu agar meri saari raahein teri 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Ni Sa Ga Sa Ga Ma Pa Ga Ma Re 
Ni Sa Ga Sa Ga Ma Pa Ga Re Sa 
Ni Sa Ga Sa Ga Ma Pa Ga Ma Re 
Ni Sa Ga Sa Ga Ma Pa Ga Re Sa 
Teri mohabbat mein jalna bhi hai 
Aur tujhse bachke hi chalna bhi hai 
Kuch rang apna badalna bhi hai 
Maine dhalna tere rang mein hai sadaa 
Tu chaand hai ik dhadakta hua 
Chori se mujhko hi takta hua 
Seene se lagke chamakta hua 
Meri jannat ka rasta 
Tu hi toh hua 
Tu agar meri ye hawaayein teri 
Tu agar meri saari raahein teri 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Betaab sa mohabbbat ka tu inqalab hai 
Mera jahaan teri baahon mein khaab khaab hai 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Rang aashiqui 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Dariya dua 
Gehra hua

#GehraHua 
#dhurandhar 
#ranveersingh 
#arijitsingh 
#shashwatsachdev 
#saraarjun

snippet.title: Aakhri Sawal Official Trailer | Sanjay Dutt | Namashi | Amit Sadh | Sameera Reddy | 15 May Release
snippet.description:
What happens when the truth refuses to stay buried?
Watch the trailer of #AakhriSawal — where every answer comes at a cost.

What begins as an academic accusation soon explodes into a nationwide debate.
Aakhri Sawal follows Vicky, a brilliant yet volatile scholar, who publicly challenges his mentor — the legendary Professor Gopal Nadkarni — accusing him of institutional bias.
As media outrage, political agendas, and public opinion collide, the confrontation transforms into a dangerous psychological chess match.
From the Gandhi assassination to the Emergency, no truth is left untouched.
But beneath the arguments lies a far deeper mystery.
Why is Vicky really asking these questions?
As buried secrets begin to surface, one final question threatens to change everything.
The Question India Never Stopped Asking.
In Cinemas on 15th May

Cast

localized.title: Aakhri Sawal Official Trailer | Sanjay Dutt | Namashi | Amit Sadh | Sameera Reddy | 15 May Release
localized.description:
What happens when the truth refuses to stay buried?
Watch the trailer of #AakhriSawal — where every answer comes at a cost.

What begins as an academic accusation soon explodes into a nationwide debate.
Aakhri Sawal follows Vicky, a brilliant yet volatile scholar, who publicly challenges his mentor — the legendary Professor Gopal Nadkarni — accusing him of institutional bias.
As media outrage, political agendas, and public opinion collide, the confrontation transforms into a dangerous psychological chess match.
From the Gandhi assassination to the Emergency, no truth is left untouched.
But beneath the arguments lies a far deeper mystery.
Why is Vicky really asking these questions?
As buried secrets begin to surface, one final question threatens to change everything.
The Question India Never Stopped Asking.
In Cinemas on 15th May

snippet.title: Tujh sang preet lagai sajana💖 तुझ संग प्रीत लगाई सजना Hindi new song #darad  bhara geet wed #song
snippet.description:
💖 Tujh Sang Preet Lagai Sajna | Heart Touching Romantic Song 2026 💖

Is khoobsurat gaane “Tujh Sang Preet Lagai Sajna” mein mehsoos karein sacche pyaar ki gehraai ❤️ Yeh hindi song har us dil ke liye hai jise kabhi kisi se sachcha pyaar hua ho… chahe wo milan ho ya judai 💔

🎶 Soft music, emotional lyrics aur soulful vibes ke saath yeh romantic song aapke dil ko zaroor chhoo jayega. Jaise ek moonlight night mein ek lantern chamakta hai, waise hi yeh love story aapke dil ko roshan karegi.
Tujh sang preet lagai sajana 🎶💖 तुझ संग प्रीत लगाई बालमा Hindi new song #darad​ bhara geet wed #song​

hi.description:
नए वीडियो के लिए सब्सक्राइब करें
रोब्लॉक्स वीडियो के लिए @OPGamerBlox को सब्सक्राइब करें ❤️

आशा है आपको वीडियो पसंद आया होगा। अगर पसंद आया तो कृपया लाइक और शेयर करें।

कॉपीराइट अधिनियम 1976 की धारा 107 के तहत कॉपीराइट अस्वीकरण: आलोचना, टिप्पणी, समाचार रिपोर्टिंग, शिक्षण, छात्रवृत्ति, शिक्षा और अनुसंधान जैसे उद्देश्यों के लिए "उचित उपयोग" की अनुमति दी गई है।

उचित उपयोग कॉपीराइट कानूनों द्वारा अनुमत एक ऐसा उपयोग है जो अन्यथा उल्लंघनकारी हो सकता है।

bn.title: অবশেষে আমি নিসান জিটিআর এবং সুপ্রা এমকে৪ কিনলাম 🤑| দামি
bn.description:
নতুন ভিডিওর জন্য অনুগ্রহ করে সাবস্ক্রাইব করুন
রোবলক্স ভিডিওর জন্য @OPGamerBlox-কে সাবস্ক্রাইব করুন ❤️

🤗 আমাকে ইনস্টাগ্রামে ফলো করুন: https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

আশা করি ভিডিওটি আপনাদের ভালো লেগেছে। যদি ভালো লেগে থাকে, অনুগ্রহ করে ভিডিওটি লাইক ও শেয়ার করুন।

১৯৭৬ সালের কপিরাইট আইনের ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী কপিরাইট দাবিত্যাগ, সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি, শিক্ষা এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে "ন্যায্য ব্যবহার"-এর অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে।

ন্যায্য ব্যবহার হলো কপিরাইট আইন দ্বারা অনুমোদিত এমন একটি ব্যবহার যা অন্যথায় লঙ্ঘনকারী হতে পারে।

ta.title: நான் இறுதியாக நிசான் ஜிடிஆர் மற்றும் சுப்ரா எம்.கே.4 வாங்கிவிட்டேன் 🤑| விலை அதிகம்
ta.description:
புதிய வீடியோக்களுக்கு சப்ஸ்கிரைப் செய்யுங்கள்
ரோப்லாக்ஸ் வீடியோக்களுக்கு @OPGamerBlox-ஐ சப்ஸ்கிரைப் செய்யுங்கள் ❤️

🤗 இன்ஸ்டாகிராமில் என்னைப் பின்தொடருங்கள்: https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

இந்த வீடியோ உங்களுக்குப் பிடித்திருக்கும் என்று நம்புகிறேன். பிடித்திருந்தால், தயவுசெய்து லைக் செய்து பகிருங்கள்.

1976 ஆம் ஆண்டின் பதிப்புரிமைச் சட்டத்தின் பிரிவு 107-இன் கீழ் பதிப்புரிமை மறுப்புரை: விமர்சனம், கருத்துரை, செய்தி அறிக்கை, கற்பித்தல், கல்வி, ஆராய்ச்சி போன்ற நோக்கங்களுக்காக "நியாயமான பயன்பாட்டிற்கு" அனுமதி வழங்கப்படுகிறது.

நியாயமான பயன்பாடு என்பது பதிப்புரிமைச் சட்டங்களால் அனுமதிக்கப்பட்ட ஒரு பயன்பாடாகும், இல்லையெனில் அது மீறலாகக் கருதப்படலாம்.

ml.title: ഞാൻ ഒടുവിൽ നിസ്സാൻ GTR ഉം SUPRA MK4 ഉം വാങ്ങി 🤑 | വില കൂടിയത്
ml.description:
പുതിയ വീഡിയോകൾക്കായി ദയവായി സബ്‌സ്‌ക്രൈബുചെയ്യുക
റോബ്‌ലോക്‌സ് വീഡിയോകൾക്കായി @OPGamerBlox സബ്‌സ്‌ക്രൈബുചെയ്യുക ❤️

🤗 ഇൻസ്റ്റാഗ്രാമിൽ എന്നെ പിന്തുടരുക: ​https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/ 

വീഡിയോ ആസ്വദിച്ചുവെങ്കിൽ, ദയവായി ലൈക്ക് ചെയ്‌ത് പങ്കിടുക. 

1976 ലെ പകർപ്പവകാശ നിയമത്തിലെ സെക്ഷൻ 107 പ്രകാരം പകർപ്പവകാശ നിരാകരണം, വിമർശനം, അഭിപ്രായം, വാർത്താ റിപ്പോർട്ടിംഗ്, അധ്യാപനം, സ്കോളർഷിപ്പ്, വിദ്യാഭ്യാസം, ഗവേഷണം തുടങ്ങിയ ആവശ്യങ്ങൾക്ക് "ന്യായമായ ഉപയോഗത്തിന്" അനുമതി നൽകിയിട്ടുണ്ട്.

പകർപ്പവകാശ നിയമങ്ങൾ അനുവദിക്കുന്ന ഒരു ഉപയോഗമാണ് ന്യായമായ ഉപയോഗം, അല്ലാത്തപക്ഷം അത് ലംഘിക്കപ്പെടാം.

1976年著作権法第107条に基づく著作権免責事項：批評、コメント、ニュース報道、教育、学術研究などの目的での「フェアユース」が認められています。

フェアユースとは、著作権法で認められている、そうでなければ著作権侵害となる可能性のある利用のことです。

ko.title: 드디어 닛산 GTR과 수프라 MK4를 샀어요! 🤑| 비싸긴 했지만요

🤗 인스타그램도 팔로우해주세요: https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

영상이 마음에 드셨다면 좋아요와 공유 부탁드립니다.

본 영상은 1976년 저작권법 제107조에 따라 비판, 논평, 뉴스 보도, 교육, 학술 연구 등의 목적으로 "공정 사용"이 허용됨을 명시합니다.

공정 사용은 저작권법에 의해 허용되는 사용으로, 그렇지 않을 경우 저작권 침해에 해당될 수 있습니다.

Disclaimer inzake auteursrecht: Volgens artikel 107 van de Copyright Act van 1976 is "fair use" toegestaan ​​voor doeleinden zoals kritiek, commentaar, nieuwsverslaggeving, onderwijs, wetenschappelijk onderzoek en studie.

pa.title: ਮੈਂ ਆਖਰਕਾਰ NISSAN GTR ਅਤੇ SUPRA MK4 ਖਰੀਦ ਲਏ 🤑| ਮਹਿੰਗਾ
pa.description:
ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਕੇ ਨਵੇਂ ਵੀਡੀਓਜ਼ ਲਈ ਸਬਸਕ੍ਰਾਈਬ ਕਰੋ
ਰੋਬਲੋਕਸ ਵੀਡੀਓਜ਼ ਲਈ @OPGamerBlox ਨੂੰ ਸਬਸਕ੍ਰਾਈਬ ਕਰੋ ❤️

🤗 ਇੰਸਟਾਗ੍ਰਾਮ 'ਤੇ ਮੇਰਾ ਪਾਲਣ ਕਰੋ: ​https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/ 

ਮੈਨੂੰ ਉਮੀਦ ਹੈ ਕਿ ਤੁਹਾਨੂੰ ਵੀਡੀਓ ਪਸੰਦ ਆਇਆ ਹੋਵੇਗਾ, ਤਾਂ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਕੇ ਵੀਡੀਓ ਨੂੰ ਲਾਈਕ ਅਤੇ ਸ਼ੇਅਰ ਕਰੋ। 

ਕਾਪੀਰਾਈਟ ਅਸਵੀਕਾਰਨ 1976 ਦੇ ਕਾਪੀਰਾਈਟ ਐਕਟ ਦੀ ਧਾਰਾ 107 ਦੇ ਤਹਿਤ, ਆਲੋਚਨਾ, ਟਿੱਪਣੀ, ਖ਼ਬਰਾਂ ਦੀ ਰਿਪੋਰਟਿੰਗ, ਸਿੱਖਿਆ, ਸਕਾਲਰਸ਼ਿਪ, ਸਿੱਖਿਆ ਅਤੇ ਖੋਜ ਵਰਗੇ ਉਦੇਸ਼ਾਂ ਲਈ "ਨਿਰਪੱਖ ਵਰਤੋਂ" ਦੀ ਆਗਿਆ ਹੈ।

ਨਿਰਪੱਖ ਵਰਤੋਂ ਕਾਪੀਰਾਈਟ ਕਾਨੂੰਨਾਂ ਦੁਆਰਾ ਆਗਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਾਪਤ ਵਰਤੋਂ ਹੈ ਜੋ ਹੋਰ ਉਲੰਘਣਾ ਕਰ ਸਕਦੀ ਹੈ।

snippet.title: Phool Parijaat | Marathi | Riteish D | Ajay – Atul | Shreya Ghoshal | Raja Shivaji In Cinemas Now
snippet.description:
‘फूल पारिजात’आलंय आपल्या भेटीसाठी

आत्ताच आपलं तिकीट बुक करा! (U/A 16+) (मराठी आणि हिंदी)

‘हिंदवी स्वराज्याचे संस्थापक’ 🚩
छत्रपती शिवाजी महाराजांच्या प्रेरणादायी जीवनावर आधारित ‘राजा शिवाजी’ 

आपल्या जवळच्या चित्रपटगृहात प्रदर्शित!

Jio Studios Presents 
A Mumbai Film Company Production
Raja Shivaji
Directed By : Riteish Vilasrao Deshmukh
Produced By : Jyoti Deshpande 
Produced By : Genelia Deshmukh
Music Composed, Arranged, Conducted, Produced By : Ajay – Atul
Choreographer : Remo D’Souza
Cinematographer : Santosh Sivan (ASC, ISC)

 A Jio Studios Release

Song Name : Phool Parijat ( Marathi Version)
Music, Composed, Arranged, Conducted, Produced by : Ajay - Atul
Marathi Original Lyrics : Ajay-Atul
Singer : Shreya Ghoshal
Recorded and Mixed by : Vijay Dayal, YRF Studios
Assisted By : Sagar Sathe, YRF Studios
Song Mastered By : Donal Whelan at Hafod Mastering, UK
Strings and Brass : Budapest Scoring Orchestra, Hungary
Recording Studio : Rottenbiller Studios
Conductor : Péter Illényi
Session producer : Bálint Sapszon
Orchestra Indian Representative : Balasubramanian G
Recording Engineer : Dénes Rédly
Studio assistant : Levente Böde
Librarian : Kati Réti
Orchestrators : Abishek V, Balasubramanian G, Sanjay RA
Flute : P M K Naveen Kumar
Female Chorus : Pragati Joshi, Arohi Mhatre, Aditi Prabhudesai, Madhura Paranjape, Chaandni RMW , Apurva Nisshad, Nidhi Hegde, Sharmistha Bhatkar, Shailey Bidwaikar, Sanchita Garge

Raja Shivaji, based on the life of India’s Greatest Warrior King – Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj, who rose against formidable powers to lay the foundation of Swarajya. Experience this grand historical spectacle on the big screen, unfolding in Marathi & Hindi
 
In Cinemas Now

snippet.title: The Odyssey | Official New Trailer
snippet.description:
The Odyssey - In Theaters 7 17 26

Christopher Nolan’s next film, The Odyssey, is a mythic action epic shot across the world using brand new IMAX® film technology. The film brings Homer’s foundational saga to IMAX® film screens for the first time and opens in theaters everywhere on July 17, 2026. 

The Odyssey stars Matt Damon, Tom Holland, Anne Hathaway, Robert Pattinson and Lupita Nyong’o, with Zendaya and Charlize Theron.

The Odyssey is produced by Emma Thomas and Christopher Nolan for their company, Syncopy. The executive producer is Thomas Hayslip.

snippet.title: Bandar Teaser + Kartavya Trailer REVIEW | Deeksha Sharma
snippet.description:
Bandar Teaser + Kartavya Trailer Review by Deeksha Sharma. Bandar Movie Featuring Bobby Deol & Sanya Malhotra Directed by Anurag Kashyap is based on real life Crime thriller which shook bollywood film industry whereas Kartavya Trailer Featuring Saif Ali Khan on Netflix is a Hunt Thriller for Truth which uncovers a dark story with New Villain Lallantop Saurabh Dwivedi. Bandar Teaser Review & Kartavya Trailer Netflix backed by Shahrukh Khan & Red Chillies Reaction would be shared in this Video. Bobby Deol 2.0 with Director Anurag Kashyap or Saif Ali Khan in Action Thriller- What are you most excited for? Do leave Comments below.

#Bandar #BandarTeaser #Kartavya

snippet.title: [HI] FFMAI 2026 Spring | South Asia Play-Ins Day 1 | Group B - C
snippet.description:
Free Fire Max Asia Invitational 2026 Spring kicks off with the South Asia Play-Ins, featuring top teams from India, Bangladesh, Nepal, and Pakistan.

Day 1 of SA Play-Ins: GROUP B vs GROUP C

The top 8 teams from SA Play-Ins will qualify to the Main Event on May 14

Group B
♦ GodLike Esports
♦ GG Instinct
♦ Autobotz Esports
♦ Team 2xD
♦ Extreme EX
♦ RZX Esports

Group C
♦ Revenant XSpark
♦ RNX Esports
♦ Flame Esports
♦ Max Esports
♦ Tonde Nepal Esports
♦ Total Winner

Schedule 📋
📅 SA Play-Ins - May 8, 9, 10
📅 Main Event Group Stage - May 14, 15, 16
📅 Grand Finals - May 18

Who will be the champion of Asia? Who will Rise Through Fire?

#FFMAI2026 #FFM #RiseThroughFire

[FFM, FFESPORTS, FFINDIA, FFMAI, FFMAI2026, FFMIC, Free Fire, Free Fire Max, Free Fire Max India, Free Fire Max Esports]

#SachJani #Sabba #PranjalDahiya #Proud
Experience the ultimate expression of love! ❤️ Sabba teams up with the sensational Pranjal Dahiya for "Sach Jani," a soulful masterpiece from the hit album 'Proud.'

With deep lyrics that resonate with every heart, "Sach Jani" beautifully captures the devotion of a partner who loves as unconditionally as a mother. Featuring a captivating performance by Pranjal Dahiya and the signature sounds of Black Virus, this is the love anthem of 2026.

snippet.title: Cape Fear — Official Trailer | Apple TV
snippet.description:
Out of prison, and out for revenge. Cape Fear premieres June 5 on Apple TV
https://apple.co/_CapeFear

Inspired by the 1991 remake directed by Martin Scorsese and produced by Steven Spielberg, a storm is coming for happily married attorneys Anna (Amy Adams) and Tom Bowden (Patrick Wilson) when Max Cady (Javier Bardem), the notorious killer they are responsible for putting behind bars, is let out of prison — and he wants vengeance. 

Hailing from UCP, a division of Universal Studio Group, and Amblin Television, “Cape Fear” is based on both the novel “The Executioners,” which inspired Gregory Peck’s Universal Pictures feature (1962) of the same name, as well as the acclaimed 1991 remake directed by Scorsese. The series is executive produced by Steven Spielberg, who produced the 1991 film, alongside Scorsese. Creator Nick Antosca showruns and produces alongside Alex Hedlund for Eat The Cat, and Darryl Frank and Justin Falvey produce alongside Spielberg for Amblin Television. Academy Award nominee Morten Tyldum will direct the pilot and serve as executive producer. The series is developed and produced through Antosca’s overall deal at UCP, where he’s been based since 2017.

Subscribe to Apple TV’s YouTube channel: https://apple.co/AppleTVYouTube

snippet.title: मेरा चाँद मुझे आया है नज़र | Mr. Aashiq | Kumar Sanu Songs | Saif Ali Khan | Twinkle Khanna
snippet.description:
1990 के दशक के सुनहरे दौर से, कुमार सानू की आवाज़ में जादू बिखेरता एक नगमा - 'मेरा चाँद मुझे आया है नज़र'। यह गाना सिर्फ एक धुन नहीं, बल्कि प्यार की गहराईयों में डूबा हुआ एक एहसास है। इस गाने के बोल, संगीत, और कुमार सानू की आवाज़ मिलकर एक ऐसा माहौल बनाते हैं जो सीधे दिल को छू जाता है। यह गाना हमें उस दौर की याद दिलाता है जब प्यार का इज़हार बड़ी सादगी और मासूमियत से किया जाता था।

'मेरा चाँद मुझे आया है नज़र' फिल्म 'मिस्टर आशिक' का एक अनमोल रत्न है, जो आज भी लाखों दिलों में बसा हुआ है। कुमार सानू ने अपनी आवाज़ से इस गाने को अमर बना दिया है। इस गाने में प्यार की तड़प, मिलने की खुशी, और बिछड़ने का गम सब कुछ बड़ी खूबसूरती से पिरोया गया है। यह गाना उन सभी प्रेमियों के लिए एक सौगात है जो अपने प्यार को शब्दों में बयां नहीं कर पाते।



Credits :

Song: Mera Chand Mujhe Aaya Hai Nazar
Album: Mr. Aashiq
Artist: Kumar Sanu
Music Director: Jatin-Lalit
Lyricist: Indiwar 



Lyrics :

Mera chand mujhe aaya hai nazar
Mera chand mujhe aaya hai nazar
Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar
Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar
Chhaya hai nasha meri aankho par
Chhaya hai nasha meri aankho par
Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar
Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar
Mera chand mujhe aaya hai nazar


Mere dil mein hai arma kai kai
Meri chahat hai abhi nayi nayi
Mere dil mein hai arma kai kai
Meri chahat hai abhi nayi nayi
Reh jaye na pyasa pyar mera
Meri baahon mein bhar de yaar mera
Itana sa karam tu kar mujh par
Itana sa karam tu kar mujh par
Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar
Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar
Mera chand mujhe aaya hai nazar


Abhi labo ko labo ne chhua nahi
Arma koi pura hua nahi
Abhi labo ko labo ne chhua nahi
Arma koi pura hua nahi
Abhi aash ka gulshan khilana hai
Abhi do jismo ko milna hai
Dekhuga abhi main wo manjar
Dekhuga abhi main wo manjar
Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar
Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar
Mera chand mujhe aaya hai nazar
Mera chand mujhe aaya hai nazar
Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar
Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar
Mera chand mujhe aaya hai nazar
Aaya hai nazar, aaya hai nazar

अगर आपको यह गाना पसंद आया, तो कृपया वीडियो को लाइक करें, कमेंट करके बताएं कि आपका पसंदीदा गाना कौन सा है, और चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करना न भूलें।

'मेरा चाँद मुझे आया है नज़र' फिल्म 'मिस्टर आशिक' का एक अनमोल रत्न है, जो आज भी लाखों दिलों में बसा हुआ है। कुमार सानू ने अपनी आवाज़ से इस गाने को अमर बना दिया है। इस गाने में प्यार की तड़प, मिलने की खुशी, और बिछड़ने का गम सब कुछ बड़ी खूबसूरती से पिरोया गया है। यह गाना उन सभी प्रेमियों के लिए एक सौगात है जो अपने प्यार को शब्दों में बयां नहीं कर पाते।



Credits :

Song: Mera Chand Mujhe Aaya Hai Nazar
Album: Mr. Aashiq
Artist: Kumar Sanu
Music Director: Jatin-Lalit
Lyricist: Indiwar

Mera chand mujhe aaya hai nazar
Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar
Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar

Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar

Mere dil mein hai arma kai kai

Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar

Abhi labo ko labo ne chhua nahi
Arma koi pura hua nahi
Abhi labo ko labo ne chhua nahi
Arma koi pura hua nahi
Abhi aash ka gulshan khilana hai
Abhi do jismo ko milna hai

Dekhuga abhi main wo manjar

अगर आपको यह गाना पसंद आया, तो कृपया वीडियो को लाइक करें, कमेंट करके बताएं कि आपका पसंदीदा गाना कौन सा है, और चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करना न भूलें।

snippet.description:
Official Trailer for the much awaited konkani film  "Toxench Zanv  (ತಶೆಂಚ್ ಜಾಂವ್)"  is here 
Earlier Titled “AMEN” 

This summer, Konkani cinema enters a new era — Toxench Zanv 🔥🎬
Grand Release from 15 May 2026 onwards
Theatres: Deralakatte, Mangalore, Padubidri, Udupi, Kundapura, Puttur and many more

Early Premieres starts from May 12, 2026

snippet.title: मैं तेरे प्यार में पागल | Prem Bandhan | Kishore Kumar | Lata Mangeshkar Songs
snippet.description:
🎶 Immerse yourself in the timeless romance of Kishore Kumar and Lata Mangeshkar with 'Main Tere Pyar Mein Pagal' from the movie Prem Bandhan! Relive the magic of 1979, as these legendary voices weave a tale of love and longing. Let the nostalgic melodies transport you to an era of pure emotions and heartfelt expressions.

Experience the golden era of Bollywood with this enchanting duet, a testament to the unparalleled artistry of Kishore Da and Lata Ji. Feel the depth of emotion in every note as they serenade your soul with their unforgettable voices. This song is a treasure trove of memories, capturing the essence of love in its purest form.



Credits :

Song: Main Tere Pyar Mein Pagal
Album: Prem Bandhan
Artist: Kishore Kumar | Lata Mangeshkar
Music Director: Laxmikant-Pyarelal
Lyricist: Anand Bakshi 


Lyrics :

Main tere pyar mein
Pagal aise ghoomta hoon
Jaise main koi pyasa badal
Barkha ko dhundata hoon
Main tere pyar mein
Pagal aise ghumti hoon
Jaise main koi pyasi badli
Sawan ko dhundti hoom
Main tere pyar mein pagal
Pagal pagal pagal


Jab jab tu chhup jati hai
In phoolo ki galiyo mein
Jab jab tu chhup jati hai
In phoolo ki galiyo mein
Aur chatakne lagti hai
Kitni kaliya kaliyo mein
Main tera pata sabhi se
Aise puchhta hu jaise main koi
Bhula rahi manjil ko dhundata hoon
Main tere pyar mein pagal
Pagal pagal pagal


Mere chehre pe
Teri thari thari do aankhe
Aankhe aankhe
Mere chehre pe
Teri thari thari do aankhe
Kitni gehari jhil hai ye
Jhil se gehari do aankhe
Main teri in aankho mein
Aise dubti hu jaise main koi
Tuti naiya manjhe ko dhundti hoon
Main tere pyar mein pagal
Pagal pagal pagal


Tu ho na ho aankho mein
Rahti teri surat hai
Ye man prem ka mandir hai
Jisme teri ye murat hai
Main teri is murat ko
Aise pujti hoon jaise main koi
Vyakul radha mohan ko dhundti hoon
Main tere pyar mein pagal
Aise ghoomta hoon
Jaise main koi pyasa badal
Jaise main koi pyasi badli
Barkha ko dhundata hoon
Sawan ko dhundti hoon
Barkha ko dhundata hoon.

If this song touched your heart, please give it a like, share your favorite classic Hindi song in the comments, and subscribe for more timeless melodies! Let the magic of music live on… ✨

snippet.title: Forza Horizon 6 – Official Launch Trailer
snippet.description:
Discover the breathtaking landscapes of Japan in over 550 real-world cars and become a racing Legend in Forza Horizon's biggest open world driving adventure yet. Japan awaits!

Coming to Xbox and PC on May 19, 2026; coming to PlayStation in 2026.

Pre-order Forza Horizon 6 now: https://forza.net/forzahorizon6

ta.title: ஃபோர்ஸா ஹொரைசன் 6 – அதிகாரப்பூர்வ வெளியீட்டு முன்னோட்டம்
ta.description:
550-க்கும் மேற்பட்ட நிஜ உலக கார்களில் ஜப்பானின் பிரமிக்க வைக்கும் நிலப்பரப்புகளைக் கண்டறிந்து, ஃபோர்ஸா ஹொரைசனின் இதுவரை இல்லாத மிகப்பெரிய திறந்த உலக ஓட்டுநர் சாகசத்தில் ஒரு பந்தய ஜாம்பவானாக மாறுங்கள். ஜப்பான் உங்களுக்காகக் காத்திருக்கிறது!

மே 19, 2026 அன்று எக்ஸ்பாக்ஸ் மற்றும் பிசி-க்கு வருகிறது; 2026-ல் பிளேஸ்டேஷனுக்கு வருகிறது.

ஃபோர்ஸா ஹொரைசன் 6-ஐ இப்போதே முன்பதிவு செய்யுங்கள்: https://forza.net/forzahorizon6
_______________________

bn.description:
৫৫০টিরও বেশি বাস্তব গাড়িতে জাপানের মনোমুগ্ধকর প্রাকৃতিক দৃশ্য আবিষ্কার করুন এবং Forza Horizon-এর এখন পর্যন্ত সবচেয়ে বড় ওপেন ওয়ার্ল্ড ড্রাইভিং অ্যাডভেঞ্চারে একজন রেসিং কিংবদন্তী হয়ে উঠুন। জাপান আপনার অপেক্ষায়!

Xbox এবং PC-তে আসছে ১৯শে মে, ২০২৬; PlayStation-এ আসছে ২০২৬ সালে।

te.title: ఫోర్జా హొరైజన్ 6 – అధికారిక విడుదల ట్రైలర్
te.description:
550కి పైగా నిజ జీవిత కార్లలో జపాన్ యొక్క ఉత్కంఠభరితమైన ప్రకృతి దృశ్యాలను కనుగొనండి మరియు ఫోర్జా హొరైజన్ యొక్క ఇప్పటివరకు అతిపెద్ద ఓపెన్ వరల్డ్ డ్రైవింగ్ సాహసంలో రేసింగ్ లెజెండ్‌గా అవ్వండి. జపాన్ మీ కోసం ఎదురుచూస్తోంది!

మే 19, 2026న Xbox మరియు PCలో; 2026లో ప్లేస్టేషన్‌లో వస్తుంది.

ఫోర్జా హొరైజన్ 6ను ఇప్పుడే ప్రీ-ఆర్డర్ చేయండి: https://forza.net/forzahorizon6
_______________________

ml.title: ഫോർസ ഹൊറൈസൺ 6 - ഔദ്യോഗിക ലോഞ്ച് ട്രെയിലർ
ml.description:
550-ലധികം യഥാർത്ഥ കാറുകളിൽ ജപ്പാന്റെ അതിമനോഹരമായ പ്രകൃതിദൃശ്യങ്ങൾ കണ്ടെത്തൂ, ഫോർസ ഹൊറൈസണിന്റെ ഇതുവരെയുള്ള ഏറ്റവും വലിയ ഓപ്പൺ വേൾഡ് ഡ്രൈവിംഗ് സാഹസികതയിൽ ഒരു റേസിംഗ് ലെജൻഡാകൂ. ജപ്പാൻ കാത്തിരിക്കുന്നു!

2026 മെയ് 19-ന് എക്സ്ബോക്സിലും പിസിയിലും വരുന്നു; 2026-ൽ പ്ലേസ്റ്റേഷനിലും വരുന്നു.

ഫോർസ ഹൊറൈസൺ 6 ഇപ്പോൾ മുൻകൂട്ടി ഓർഡർ ചെയ്യുക: https://forza.net/forzahorizon6

pa.title: ਫੋਰਜ਼ਾ ਹੋਰਾਈਜ਼ਨ 6 - ਅਧਿਕਾਰਤ ਲਾਂਚ ਟ੍ਰੇਲਰ
pa.description:
550 ਤੋਂ ਵੱਧ ਅਸਲ-ਸੰਸਾਰ ਦੀਆਂ ਕਾਰਾਂ ਵਿੱਚ ਜਾਪਾਨ ਦੇ ਸਾਹਸੀ ਦ੍ਰਿਸ਼ਾਂ ਦੀ ਖੋਜ ਕਰੋ ਅਤੇ ਫੋਰਜ਼ਾ ਹੋਰਾਈਜ਼ਨ ਦੇ ਹੁਣ ਤੱਕ ਦੇ ਸਭ ਤੋਂ ਵੱਡੇ ਓਪਨ ਵਰਲਡ ਡਰਾਈਵਿੰਗ ਸਾਹਸ ਵਿੱਚ ਇੱਕ ਰੇਸਿੰਗ ਲੈਜੈਂਡ ਬਣੋ। ਜਪਾਨ ਉਡੀਕ ਕਰ ਰਿਹਾ ਹੈ!

19 ਮਈ, 2026 ਨੂੰ Xbox ਅਤੇ PC 'ਤੇ ਆ ਰਿਹਾ ਹੈ; 2026 ਵਿੱਚ PlayStation 'ਤੇ ਆ ਰਿਹਾ ਹੈ।

ਫੋਰਜ਼ਾ ਹੋਰਾਈਜ਼ਨ 6 ਨੂੰ ਹੁਣੇ ਪ੍ਰੀ-ਆਰਡਰ ਕਰੋ: https://forza.net/forzahorizon6

Karuppu Fanmade Trailer | Concept Work

Thanks for Watching ❣️

Karuppu is an upcoming Indian Tamil-language film directed by RJ Balaji, who co-wrote the script with Rathna Kumar. Produced by Dream Warrior Pictures, the film stars Suriya and Trisha Krishnan, alongside Swasika, Indrans, Yogi Babu, Sshivada, Natty Subramaniam and Supreeth Reddy.

snippet.title: My Last Video
snippet.description:
my last video...
Nahi socha tha ki kabhi aisi video banani padegi... 💔
Socha tha ye mera aakhri video hoga, par sachai saamne lana zaroori tha. Jisne ye copyright strike di hai, usne na sirf channel ko 7 din mein delete karwane ki dhamki di hai, balki peeche se abuses bhi kiye hain. Is video mein saara sach aur unka double face expose kiya hai.

Mera hamesha se focus aap logo ke liye best content lane par raha hai, par ab aage kya hoga mujhe khud nahi pata. Poori situation video mein explain ki hai. Agar aap logo ne hamesha support kiya hai, toh aaj aapki sabse zyada zaroorat hai.

Aage ke updates ke liye connect rahna:

On Instagram 
👉 https://www.instagram.com/bixiopofficial?igsh=NGtoa2prcjhscHFw&utm_source=

snippet.title: BAVA BAVA Lyrical | CITYLIGHTS | Vinay Rajkumar | Monisha Vijaykumar | Charan Raj | Vijaya Kumar
snippet.description:
🔥 Warning: Extreme Mass Alert! 🚨 BAVA BAVA is finally here
Presenting The BAVA BAVA Lyrical from the Movie #CITYLIGHTS  Starring : Vinay Rajkumar, Monisha Vijaykumar & Others Exclusive Only On Anand Audio Official Youtube Channel..!!! 
-----------------------------------------
#CITYLIGHTS #bavabava #citylightsmovie #vinayrajkumar #anandaudio  
#duniyavijaykumar  #charanraj #monishavijaykumar  #youtube #ankithkumar  
-----------------------------------------
Lyrics by Ankith Kumar 
Follow on: https://www.instagram.com/ankith_kumarr/

Lyrics:
Eh Bava Bava Ba Inge pesu
BA BA Black sheepu Baduta piecuuu
Shirki savasu shekmana kotte
Shekna ka un lifuuu bod bod motte

Thinruk kali ille Biludana oka
Ing Namravre namruku oikrudu pakka
Nigradbeda magne kithakthin pukka
Nodoke area dal Nan obne sukka

Eh patte Kya re khana kaya 
Mamu ka dukhan meh by two chaya
Pileko hojata dimaku Maya 
Shivajinagar meh nalli ka paya

Bat alli bitre odyod onde shotuu
Nenskobek makla niv harishchandra ghatu
Touch madthini anod beda ma thougtuu
Vade paisa aksthini kalskodla date uuu...

Odu odu odu tirgbeda hinde 
Yamunange kansthini annamun munde
Yak hutde antha ning ansbeko munde
Good morning helalla kaldoithya Sunday 

Thilkondu  fight madu alka nan magne
Baik bandid boglmana badko ya magne
En thanteg barmana udrushu pallu
Ammaniiiii bandaka pullu

Nangle niyathkal manshru 
Eppunu engluke ben hinde vakraga sooori
Niyath kala illa  illi nambidake jothe idu game adi akidu choori

Thinrudu sheesh kali baluk mav Adada etu 
dodthale ethnappa kudkurdu rate uuuu...
Thale kedskolalla nanu hidkyoke slate uuu
Estojana ote urig madode hate uuu

Onak sheesh thindotu daulattu peshii
Draggeruu nugshanaka barodilla teshii
Sadilde nin body Kalsthini kaashi
Gothilde hutidya gothilla Raashi

Parents ge yavathu ursbeda otte 
Avr mathu kellilla jail uta thatte
Sirki savasu ni shekmana kotte 
Sheknaka un lifuuu bod bod motte 

Eh Bava Bava Ba Inge pesu
BA BA Black sheepu Baduta piecuuu
Shirki savasu shekmana kotte
Shekna un lifuuu bod bod motte

Thinruk kali ille Biludana oka
Ing Namravre namruku oikrudu pakka
Nigradbeda magne kithakthin pukka
Nodoke area dal Nan obne sukka
----------

localized.title: BAVA BAVA Lyrical | CITYLIGHTS | Vinay Rajkumar | Monisha Vijaykumar | Charan Raj | Vijaya Kumar
localized.description:
🔥 Warning: Extreme Mass Alert! 🚨 BAVA BAVA is finally here
Presenting The BAVA BAVA Lyrical from the Movie #CITYLIGHTS  Starring : Vinay Rajkumar, Monisha Vijaykumar & Others Exclusive Only On Anand Audio Official Youtube Channel..!!! 
-----------------------------------------
#CITYLIGHTS #bavabava #citylightsmovie #vinayrajkumar #anandaudio  
#duniyavijaykumar  #charanraj #monishavijaykumar  #youtube #ankithkumar  
-----------------------------------------
Lyrics by Ankith Kumar 
Follow on: https://www.instagram.com/ankith_kumarr/

Lyrics:
Eh Bava Bava Ba Inge pesu
BA BA Black sheepu Baduta piecuuu
Shirki savasu shekmana kotte
Shekna ka un lifuuu bod bod motte

Thinruk kali ille Biludana oka
Ing Namravre namruku oikrudu pakka
Nigradbeda magne kithakthin pukka
Nodoke area dal Nan obne sukka

Eh patte Kya re khana kaya 
Mamu ka dukhan meh by two chaya
Pileko hojata dimaku Maya 
Shivajinagar meh nalli ka paya

Bat alli bitre odyod onde shotuu
Nenskobek makla niv harishchandra ghatu
Touch madthini anod beda ma thougtuu
Vade paisa aksthini kalskodla date uuu...

Odu odu odu tirgbeda hinde 
Yamunange kansthini annamun munde
Yak hutde antha ning ansbeko munde
Good morning helalla kaldoithya Sunday 

Thilkondu  fight madu alka nan magne
Baik bandid boglmana badko ya magne
En thanteg barmana udrushu pallu
Ammaniiiii bandaka pullu

Nangle niyathkal manshru 
Eppunu engluke ben hinde vakraga sooori
Niyath kala illa  illi nambidake jothe idu game adi akidu choori

Thinrudu sheesh kali baluk mav Adada etu 
dodthale ethnappa kudkurdu rate uuuu...
Thale kedskolalla nanu hidkyoke slate uuu
Estojana ote urig madode hate uuu

Onak sheesh thindotu daulattu peshii
Draggeruu nugshanaka barodilla teshii
Sadilde nin body Kalsthini kaashi
Gothilde hutidya gothilla Raashi

Parents ge yavathu ursbeda otte 
Avr mathu kellilla jail uta thatte
Sirki savasu ni shekmana kotte 
Sheknaka un lifuuu bod bod motte 

Eh Bava Bava Ba Inge pesu
BA BA Black sheepu Baduta piecuuu
Shirki savasu shekmana kotte
Shekna un lifuuu bod bod motte

Thinruk kali ille Biludana oka
Ing Namravre namruku oikrudu pakka
Nigradbeda magne kithakthin pukka
Nodoke area dal Nan obne sukka
----------

Listen to the sacred Sri Lalitha Sahasranama Stotram and experience the divine blessings of Goddess Lalitha Devi. 🙏

It is believed that listening to Lalitha Sahasranamam even once can bring health, wealth, prosperity, and good fortune into your life. This powerful stotram removes negativity, brings peace of mind, and fills your home with positive energy and abundance.

In this video, you can listen to the full Lalitha Sahasranama Stotram with Telugu lyrics, making it easy to follow and chant along.

snippet.title: Panna Ki Tamanna Hai 💔 | 90s Bollywood Sad Love Song | Heart Touching Hindi Song 2026
snippet.description:
💔 Panna Ki Tamanna Hai | 90s Bollywood Style Sad Romantic Song | Heart Touching Love Story

अगर आप 90s बॉलीवुड के दिल छू लेने वाले गाने पसंद करते हैं, तो यह गाना आपके दिल को जरूर छू जाएगा…
“Panna Ki Tamanna Hai” एक ऐसी मोहब्बत की कहानी है जो अधूरी रह गई… दर्द, जुदाई और सच्चे प्यार की भावना से भरा हुआ।

🎧 इस गाने में आपको मिलेगा:
• Emotional love story
• 90s Bollywood nostalgic vibes
• Heart touching lyrics & soulful music
• Sad romantic feel जो दिल को छू जाए

❤️ Feel the Pain… Feel the Love… Feel the Song

🎤 Credits:
Singer: Rupa Singh
Music & Lyrics: Sunny Vijay
Label: Sunny Vijay Official

📌 About the Song:
यह गाना एक अधूरी मोहब्बत की कहानी को दर्शाता है, जहाँ प्यार तो सच्चा होता है लेकिन किस्मत साथ नहीं देती…
अगर आपने कभी किसी से सच्चा प्यार किया है, तो यह गाना आपको जरूर relatable लगेगा।

localized.title: Panna Ki Tamanna Hai 💔 | 90s Bollywood Sad Love Song | Heart Touching Hindi Song 2026
localized.description:
💔 Panna Ki Tamanna Hai | 90s Bollywood Style Sad Romantic Song | Heart Touching Love Story

अगर आप 90s बॉलीवुड के दिल छू लेने वाले गाने पसंद करते हैं, तो यह गाना आपके दिल को जरूर छू जाएगा…
“Panna Ki Tamanna Hai” एक ऐसी मोहब्बत की कहानी है जो अधूरी रह गई… दर्द, जुदाई और सच्चे प्यार की भावना से भरा हुआ।

🎧 इस गाने में आपको मिलेगा:
• Emotional love story
• 90s Bollywood nostalgic vibes
• Heart touching lyrics & soulful music
• Sad romantic feel जो दिल को छू जाए

❤️ Feel the Pain… Feel the Love… Feel the Song

🎤 Credits:
Singer: Rupa Singh
Music & Lyrics: Sunny Vijay
Label: Sunny Vijay Official

📌 About the Song:
यह गाना एक अधूरी मोहब्बत की कहानी को दर्शाता है, जहाँ प्यार तो सच्चा होता है लेकिन किस्मत साथ नहीं देती…
अगर आपने कभी किसी से सच्चा प्यार किया है, तो यह गाना आपको जरूर relatable लगेगा।

snippet.description:
Forest Escape: Last Train is a co-op horror exploration game for 1-4 players in the mysterious forest. Repair your locomotive, solve the insane Warden’s eerie puzzles, and outrun the stuff of nightmares as you try to escape this twisted realm.

#forestescape #vtg #vasanthtamilgaming #trainhorror #choochoocharles #gaming

Lyrics :-
Ye bootal bhari bharai ,,
Na hothon say lagai ,,
Gajab toh dekho yaaro ,,
Usne aankho say pillai ,,

Pehle toh najar milaai ,
Dekh kay muskuraayi/ muskaaayi
Gajab toh dekho yaaro ,
Usne aankho say pilaayi ,,


Tujh jaisi na koi teeno lok may , 
Sabkuch lutaa du tere shounk may ,,
Tum or shraab miley hue ho ,,
Rehne ni dete dono hosh may ,,


Chanachal kajraari aankeyy ,,
Haaye shikaari aankehi ,,
Dil pay chalaye churriya 
Teri kataari aankhein ,,

Naagin c haaye julfey ,,
Kaali ghataye julfey ,,
Maaregi toba toba ,,
Teri blaaye julfey ,,

Tootay chaand ka garur ,
Tere cehray ka Noor ,,
Tujhey dekh dekh hota hai deewane ko sarur ,,

Tujh jaisi na koi teeno lok may , 
Sabkuch lutaa du tere shounk may ,,
Tum or shraab miley hue ho ,,
Rehne ni dete dono hosh may ,,
#sharab #himeshreshammiya #manushichhillar #hugel #viral #trending

bn.title: সোলনাকুল দ্য আর্কিটেক্ট 🧠 | টিম সোল #১ একটি বিশেষ কারণে | বিএমপিএস তৃতীয় দিন
bn.description:
📷 ইনস্টাগ্রাম - https://www.instagram.com/mrspike10/

ডিসকর্ডে আমাকে অনুসরণ করুন 👇
https://discord.com/invite/2pejjUbCKj

▶️ দ্বিতীয় চ্যানেল - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCasVrVp-Lr0ynmxFeXRG3oQ

📧mrspikeinquiry@gmail.com

➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖

✅কপিরাইট আইন ১৯৭৬-এর ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী কপিরাইট দাবিত্যাগ, সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে "ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের" অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে। ন্যায্য ব্যবহার হলো কপিরাইট আইন দ্বারা অনুমোদিত একটি ব্যবহার যা অন্যথায় লঙ্ঘনকারী হতে পারে। অলাভজনক, শিক্ষামূলক বা ব্যক্তিগত ব্যবহারের ক্ষেত্রে ফেয়ার ইউজের (ন্যায্য ব্যবহার) পাল্লা ভারী থাকে।

✅ভিডিও গেম ডিসক্লেইমার: এই ভিডিওর বিষয়বস্তু শুধুমাত্র শিক্ষামূলক ব্যবহারের জন্য। গেমপ্লেটি হলো Battlegrounds Mobile India (BGMI) নামক একটি ভিডিও গেম এবং এটি একটি কাল্পনিক সৃষ্টি।

➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖
✅যারা আমার ভিডিও দেখেন, লাইক, শেয়ার এবং কমেন্ট করেন, তাদের সবাইকে অসংখ্য ধন্যবাদ। আপনাদের কাছে এটি হয়তো একটি ছোট বিষয় মনে হতে পারে, কিন্তু আমি আপনাদের প্রত্যেককে আন্তরিকভাবে ধন্যবাদ জানাই। আপনাদের দেওয়া সমস্ত মতামত এবং মন্তব্যই আমাদের চ্যানেলকে আজকের এই পর্যায়ে নিয়ে আসতে সাহায্য করেছে।
তাই আবারও, আপনাদের সবাইকে অসংখ্য ধন্যবাদ!!! 😍

➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖

snippet.title: Dil ka kya kare sahib (Original)

snippet.title: Toota Jo Kabhi Tara 8K Video | A Flying Jatt | Tiger Shroff, Jacqueline | Sumedha K | Sachin Jigar
snippet.description:
Experience pure romance with Toota Jo Kabhi Tara from the movie A Flying Jatt, featuring the charming on‑screen chemistry of Tiger Shroff and Jacqueline Fernandez.
🎶 Beautifully composed by the talented Sachin–Jigar, this song expresses love, hope, and emotional connection through soulful melodies and heartfelt moments. Presented in 8K Ultra HD, the visuals are richer, sharper, and more immersive than ever, enhancing every romantic scene.

Title : Toota Jo Kabhi Tara
Singer: Sumedha Karmahe
Lyrics : Priya Saraiya
Music : Sachin-Jigar
Arrangers/Programmers : Sachin-Jigar & Tanuj Tiku
Mixed&Mastered at : Future Sound of Bombay by Eric Pillai
Strings - Chennai Strings
Flute - Naveen Kumar
Music Production Head : Romil Ved

Cast : Tiger Shroff, Jacqueline Fernandez
Banner : Balaji Motion Pictures
Producer : Shobha Kapoor & Ekta Kapoor
Director : Remo D'Souza

snippet.title: #Video - मोती घघरिया के - #Ashish Yadav, #Srishti Bharti का सुपरहिट गाना - New #Magahi Song 2026
snippet.description:
►Album :- मोती घघरिया के
►Song :- Moti Ghaghariya Ke
►Singer :- Aashish Yadav, Srishti Bharti
►Feat :- Priti Tiwari
►Lyrics :- Chintu Raja
►Music :- Pappu Bhai
►Composer :- Nandan Yadav
►Video Director :- Aryan Dev
►Editor / Colorist :- Subham Babu
►Choreographer :- Raunak Shah 
►Dop :-  Ranjit Singh , Ravi Rathor
►Di :- Rohit Singh Mumbai
►Production :- Guddu Arya
►Producer :- Aashish Yadav 
► Label / Company :- Aashish Yadav Dhamaka
► Trade Inquiry :- 
_______________________________________________________________________
► Digital : Suraj Sundram
► Digital Manager : Himanshu Pandey
► Digital Partner : Brother's Media 8877998058
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
► अगर आप इस विडियो को पसंद करते हैं तो 
हमारे चैनल को Subscribe जरूर करें : 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
► About Me Visit My Website :
► Fallow Me 
► Facebook Page 
► Instagram :-
► Twitter :- 

आप सभी भोजपुरी दर्शको को मेरा प्रणाम, मै Aashish Yadav तहे दिल से आप सभी का धन्यबाद करता हूँ ,आप लोगो ने मुझे बहुत प्यार और आशीर्वाद दिया, इसका ,मै बहुत बहुत शुक्रगुजार हूँ , आप सब से अनुरोध है की ,आप सब हमारे इस चैनल Aashish Yadav Dhamaka को भी इसी तरह प्यार और आशीर्वाद देते रहिये (प्रणाम)

#MotiGhaghariyaKe #ashish #मोती_घघरिया_के  #ashishyadav #maghi

snippet.title: Paal Dabba - Psilovibin (Music Video) || Prod. Foxn
snippet.description:
psilovibin

This song is about my journey from a quiet kid to finally be able to express myself. I’ve replaced
doubt with discipline and hard work. It isn't luck; it’s about learning from mistakes, staying true to myself, and finally owning my own path.

Starring: Paal Dabba
Special Appearance: Trisha Krishnan 
Music : Foxn
Mix & Master: Akash Shravan 
Additional vocals: Mary Ann Alexander, Irfan Erooth.

snippet.title: Tere Bagair Hi Acche The Hum 💔 Ye Dil Ab Maan Gaya | Soulful Sufi Qawwali | New Sad Qawwali 2026
snippet.description:
"Tere Bagair Hi Acche The Hum 💔 Ye Dil Ab Maan Gaya” ek dil ko chhoo lene wala soulful Sufi Qawwali ishq song hai jo mohabbat ke dard, judaai ki takleef aur tanha raaton ki kahani bayan karta hai. Yeh gaana un logon ke liye hai jinhone kabhi sachcha ishq kiya hai aur usme toot gaye hain.

Is qawwali mein ek aashiq ke dil ka haal bayan hota hai jo apni mehbooba ki yaadon se bhaagna chahta hai, lekin har raat woh yaadein usse aur gehra zakhm de jaati hain. Sharab sirf ek bahana hai, asal mein woh apne dard ko sulane ki koshish karta hai.

Yeh gaana Sufi andaaz mein ishq-e-majazi se ishq-e-haqeeqi tak ka safar bhi dikhata hai. Jab duniya ke pyaar mein insaan toot jaata hai, tab woh Rab ki taraf mudta hai. Har lafz, har sur aur har ehsaas is gaane mein dil ki gehraiyon se nikla hai.

Agar aapko sad songs, qawwali, ya Sufi music pasand hai, toh yeh gaana aapke dil ko zaroor chhoo lega.

👍 Like karein
💬 Comment karke apni feelings share karein
🔔 Channel ko subscribe karein aur bell icon dabayein

Lyrics:

Kabhi-kabhi… Hum jis insaan ke liye sab kuch chhod dete hain… Wahi humein ye sikha jaata hai… Ki hum uske bina hi behtar the…"


"Maine socha tha… Tu meri duniya hai… Par sach ye tha… Main teri duniya mein kahin tha hi nahi… Tu gaya… to dard hua… Par usi dard ne bataya… Ki hum tere bagair hi acche the…"


"Tere saath hanste hue bhi roya hoon main, Tere bina ab sukoon se soya hoon main… Ajeeb hai ye ishq ka fasana bhi, Tujhe paakar khoya… tujhe khokar paaya hoon main…"


Tere bagair acche the hum… Ye dil ab maan gaya… Tu tha to khoye hue the, Tu gaya to jaan gaya…


Tere saath har lamha bhaari tha, Par maine use pyaar kaha… Teri har khamoshi ko maine, Apna ikraar kaha…
Maine khud ko tujh mein khoya, Har sapna tujhpe vaar diya… Tune badle mein kya diya, Bas ek toota sa sansaar diya…


"Log kehte hain… Mohabbat sukoon deti hai… Par shayad… Galat insaan se mohabbat… Sukoon cheen leti hai…"


Tere bagair acche the hum… Ab ye ehsaas hua… Tere saath rehkar hi kyun, Dil itna udaas hua…


Ab jo tu nahi hai paas mere, Saansein bhi halki lagti hain… Tere diye hue saare zakhm, Ab aadat si lagti hain…
Maine khud se rishta joda, Dil ko phir samjhaya hai… Tu ek sabak tha zindagi ka, Jisne mujhe banaya hai…


"Tu mila bhi to dard dekar, Tu gaya bhi to sukoon dekar… Ab na koi shikayat tujhse, Main jee raha hoon khud ko lekar…"


Tere jhooth pe yakeen kiya, Har dhokhe ko apna liya… Maine tujhe apna samjha, Tune mujhe hi gair kiya…
Ab jo door hoon tujhse, To sach saaf dikhai deta hai… Tu kabhi mera tha hi nahi, Ye dil ab samajh leta hai…


"Kabhi-kabhi… Kisi ka chale jaana… Tujhe todta nahi… Tujhe sach dikha jaata hai…"


"Tu tha to main khoya tha… Tu gaya to main paaya hoon… Tere bagair hi sahi… Ab khud mein samaya hoon…"


Tere bagair acche the hum… Ab dil ye kehta hai… Tu ek beeta hua kissa hai, Jo ab na rehta hai…
Ab na koi dard baaki hai, Na koi adhoori raat… Main khud mein hi poora hoon, Yahi hai meri aukaat…

"Kuch rishte… Khatam nahi hote… Bas humein… Khud se milakar… Chale jaate hain…"

📌 keywords:

en.title: Tere Bagair Hi Acche The Hum 💔 Ye Dil Ab Maan Gaya | Soulful Sufi Qawwali | New Sad Qawwali 2026
en.description:
"Tere Bagair Hi Acche The Hum 💔 Ye Dil Ab Maan Gaya” ek dil ko chhoo lene wala soulful Sufi Qawwali ishq song hai jo mohabbat ke dard, judaai ki takleef aur tanha raaton ki kahani bayan karta hai. Yeh gaana un logon ke liye hai jinhone kabhi sachcha ishq kiya hai aur usme toot gaye hain.

Is qawwali mein ek aashiq ke dil ka haal bayan hota hai jo apni mehbooba ki yaadon se bhaagna chahta hai, lekin har raat woh yaadein usse aur gehra zakhm de jaati hain. Sharab sirf ek bahana hai, asal mein woh apne dard ko sulane ki koshish karta hai.

Yeh gaana Sufi andaaz mein ishq-e-majazi se ishq-e-haqeeqi tak ka safar bhi dikhata hai. Jab duniya ke pyaar mein insaan toot jaata hai, tab woh Rab ki taraf mudta hai. Har lafz, har sur aur har ehsaas is gaane mein dil ki gehraiyon se nikla hai.

Agar aapko sad songs, qawwali, ya Sufi music pasand hai, toh yeh gaana aapke dil ko zaroor chhoo lega.

👍 Like karein
💬 Comment karke apni feelings share karein
🔔 Channel ko subscribe karein aur bell icon dabayein

Lyrics:

Kabhi-kabhi… Hum jis insaan ke liye sab kuch chhod dete hain… Wahi humein ye sikha jaata hai… Ki hum uske bina hi behtar the…"


"Maine socha tha… Tu meri duniya hai… Par sach ye tha… Main teri duniya mein kahin tha hi nahi… Tu gaya… to dard hua… Par usi dard ne bataya… Ki hum tere bagair hi acche the…"


"Tere saath hanste hue bhi roya hoon main, Tere bina ab sukoon se soya hoon main… Ajeeb hai ye ishq ka fasana bhi, Tujhe paakar khoya… tujhe khokar paaya hoon main…"


Tere bagair acche the hum… Ye dil ab maan gaya… Tu tha to khoye hue the, Tu gaya to jaan gaya…


Tere saath har lamha bhaari tha, Par maine use pyaar kaha… Teri har khamoshi ko maine, Apna ikraar kaha…
Maine khud ko tujh mein khoya, Har sapna tujhpe vaar diya… Tune badle mein kya diya, Bas ek toota sa sansaar diya…


"Log kehte hain… Mohabbat sukoon deti hai… Par shayad… Galat insaan se mohabbat… Sukoon cheen leti hai…"


Tere bagair acche the hum… Ab ye ehsaas hua… Tere saath rehkar hi kyun, Dil itna udaas hua…


Ab jo tu nahi hai paas mere, Saansein bhi halki lagti hain… Tere diye hue saare zakhm, Ab aadat si lagti hain…
Maine khud se rishta joda, Dil ko phir samjhaya hai… Tu ek sabak tha zindagi ka, Jisne mujhe banaya hai…


"Tu mila bhi to dard dekar, Tu gaya bhi to sukoon dekar… Ab na koi shikayat tujhse, Main jee raha hoon khud ko lekar…"


Tere jhooth pe yakeen kiya, Har dhokhe ko apna liya… Maine tujhe apna samjha, Tune mujhe hi gair kiya…
Ab jo door hoon tujhse, To sach saaf dikhai deta hai… Tu kabhi mera tha hi nahi, Ye dil ab samajh leta hai…


"Kabhi-kabhi… Kisi ka chale jaana… Tujhe todta nahi… Tujhe sach dikha jaata hai…"


"Tu tha to main khoya tha… Tu gaya to main paaya hoon… Tere bagair hi sahi… Ab khud mein samaya hoon…"


Tere bagair acche the hum… Ab dil ye kehta hai… Tu ek beeta hua kissa hai, Jo ab na rehta hai…
Ab na koi dard baaki hai, Na koi adhoori raat… Main khud mein hi poora hoon, Yahi hai meri aukaat…

"Kuch rishte… Khatam nahi hote… Bas humein… Khud se milakar… Chale jaate hain…"

Mehalon ki rani
Dukh se begani
Lag jaye na dhoop tujhe
Ud ud jau
Sabko bataon
Dhoop lage hai chao mein mujhe

Kaaton se ho jaye paon na ghayal
Kaaton pe naachungi bandh ke mein payal
Ghar nahi yeh to
Kutiya humari hai

Yeh teri kutiya to mehalo se pyaari hai

Kya mausam aaya hai
Kya mausam aaya hai

Purab se mastani purvai chali
Khushoo se mehki
Phoolon ki gali

Geet gaye nadiyan
Lehron mein hai sargam
Hai ghata deewani
Boondon mein hai cham cham

Kya mausam aaya hai
Kya mausam aaya hai

Ujaale gagan ki

Cheekne dagar hai
Geer ne ka daar hai

Cheekne dagar hai
Geer ne ka daar hai
Tham ka tera haath chalu

Kya tujhe jaannat ki raunka nahi bhai

snippet.title: Kadak Maal - Video Song | Mango Pachcha | Sanchii | Charan Raj | Rahul Ditto | MC Bijju | Pavan
snippet.description:
For more latest songs & videos, subscribe 👉 https://bit.ly/Saregama_Kannada

Presenting the Fiery Banger Rap video song of 'Kadak Maal' from "Mango Pachcha" starring Sanchii aka Junior Kichcha, Kaajal Kunder, Mayur Patel and others. Directed by Viveka. Music Composed by Charan Raj. The Movie is jointly produced by Supriyanvi Picture Studio and KRG Studios - Priya Sudeep, Karthik, and Yogi G Raj.

Song Credits:
♪ Song Title : Kadak Maal  
♪ Banners : KRG Studios & Supriyanvi Picture Studio 
♪ Album / Movie : Mango Pachcha 
♪ Singer : Rahul Ditto, MC Biju, Pavan Sadak 
♪ Lyricist: Rahul Ditto, MC Biju, Pavan Sadak, Nagarjun Sharma
♪ Music : Charan Raj MR 

Music Credits:
♪ All tracks Composed, Arranged and Produced by Charan Raj 
♪ Vocals – Rahul Ditto, MC Biju, Pavan Sadak 
♪ Lyrics - Rahul Ditto, MC Biju, Pavan Sadak, Nagarjun Sharma 
♪ Music Producers - Charan Raj, Sujith Sreedhar, Sanjay Romauld and Bhuvanesh 
♪ Guitars - Sunil Silvester ♪ Brass Section - Vijay 
♪ Additional programming - Raghothama NS
♪ Music Supervision - Ananth Kamath M  
♪ Recording Engineers - Amal Mithu  
♪ Studio Session Manager – Vignesh Raj @ 2barQ Studios  
♪ Mixed and Mastered - Sujith Sreedhar
♪ Music video directed and shot by - What are the odds productions 

Movie Credits:
♪ Producers: Priya Sudeep, Karthik & Yogi G Raj 
♪ Executive Producers: MT Sriram, Abhijith K B  
♪ Director: Viveka 
♪ Written by: Viveka, Nagabhushan Deshpande 
♪ Cast: Sanchith Sanjeev, Kaajal Kunder, Prashanth Hiremat, Mayur Patel, Jai Gopinath, Harini Srikanth, Hamsa, Ugram Manju 
♪ Chief Associate Director: Nagabhushan Deshpande
♪ Direction team: Ananya U S, Daniel Raj E, Dhanush K.R, Dr. Rashmith 
♪ DOP: Shekar Chandra 
♪ Camera team: Mariswamy, Madhusudan B R, Sai Raghavendra K, Umesh 
♪ Action Director: Dr.K Ravi Varma, Real Satish, Narsimha C 
♪ Art Director: Vishwas Kashyap ♪Chief Art Associate: Raghavendra Rao
♪ Music Director: Charan Raj
♪ Dance choreography: A Harsha 
♪ Makeup Chief: Ismail(Mysore)  
♪ Costume Designer: Yogi G Raj 
♪ Chief Costumer: Lakshminarayana(Nani) 
 ♪ Sound Design: Sreesan G MPSE 
♪ Final Mix: Jaison Jose & Daniel Jefferson 
♪ Colorist: Ashik Kusugolli
♪ Editor: Sharath Vashisht 
♪ Online Editor: Sohan Kalaburgi 
♪ Additional dialogues: Kantharaju.S.S 
♪ Still photographer: Siddu G B
♪ VFX studios: Fortune FX 
♪ Production Manager: Sudhir K M 
♪ Record Label : Saregama Kannada 
♪ Marketing : KRG Connects
♪ Marketing Team : Chethan Nanjundaiah, Anil Anirudh, Bindushree, Vishruth G, Roopa Achar & Rahul 
♪ PRO : Pink Tickets & Harish Arasu ♪ Publicity Design: Deekshith Sagar 

Lyrics:
Loo mari namdella onde guri
Field alli hosa thali bandaithu side’ig sari
Keluskolole mari kodtivi thotapuri
Hachaitu benki kidi thakatidre neen thadi

Shuruvaytu shukradese, tumbaytu khali kise.
Guri itre misse illa kaldogtiya keli kathe

Kanasina baagilu teredaagide, kaaytidda jeevana kaiyallide.
Naav nintagide, field set aagide, yaavan bandrunu kai kattakode.

Salige suligege kaarana,
Tale odsi beelisbeku gaalana,
Dhandeli dhumki tilibeku aalana.
Aalordenee yeliyodu kaalana.

Bandide kale paal marketige
Beda bhava gotilla sarikkige,
Mai tumba gathide, 
Cold vibe mast ide
Full on sokkide
Noorik noor kick-ide.

Smooth aagide slow alla ma
Time aagidre madbeku calm-m
Onagide chigru hasragide.
Beldu nintovn helkolakke kaaytide maam.

Chacha ond dose packet

Nannadeega marukatte gathinalli kalu itte,
Benna hinde bandavara neralige prana kotte,
Pitipiti kitikiti maduvara sidigitte,
Maathaliro mitigala mootekatti daanakotte,
Hanagala holeyanu hidiyalu anekatte,
Kattikondu kedavide bekagilla katakate,
Hasivige hedarlilla esto dina khali tatte,
Kattitta sittaneega bhajarige haribitte.

Thooka irod mamuli, aadu prathi mathali,
Hinde inda bandu kunthidivi front seat ali.

Loo mari namdella onde guri
Field alli hosa thali bandaithu side’ig sari
Keluskolole mari kodtivi thotapuri
Hachaitu benki kidi thakatidre neen thadi

Nintogidda time iga ododikke ready
Nilsakke yaar kaiyyal agodilla nadi
Pasar agbek hesariga prathi ooru keri
Henge belithivi yella gang jothe seri

Naavenu Yarginta kammi illa Yarginta dummy illa 
Munde itta hejjena hinde yendu idodilla
Yaar maatu kelodilla kelu anta helodilla
Sari daaril hogodikke samajane sarigilla


Label: Saregama India Limited, A RPSG Group Company

To buy the original and virus free track, visit www.saregama.com
Follow us on: YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/user/Saregamakannada
Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/Saregamakannada
X: https://twitter.com/saregamasouth

#KadakMaal #MangoPachcha #Sanchii #CharanRajMR #KaajalKunder #SaregamaKannada

snippet.title: GTA 5 LIVE | Train vs 100 Luxury Cars 😱🔥 कौन बचेगा?
snippet.description:
आज की इस 🔴 LIVE स्ट्रीम में हम Grand Theft Auto V के अंदर एक जबरदस्त एक्सपेरिमेंट करने वाले हैं!

🚗💥 100 लग्ज़री गाड़ियों को रेलवे ट्रैक पर खड़ा किया गया है
🚆 और सामने से आ रही है फुल स्पीड ट्रेन!

😱 क्या ये महंगी गाड़ियाँ ट्रेन को रोक पाएंगी?
या फिर सब कुछ हो जाएगा चकनाचूर?

১৯৭৬ সালের কপিরাইট আইনের ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী কপিরাইট দাবিত্যাগ, সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি, শিক্ষা এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে "ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের" অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে।

ন্যায্য ব্যবহার হলো কপিরাইট আইন দ্বারা অনুমোদিত একটি ব্যবহার যা অন্যথায় লঙ্ঘনকারী হতে পারে।

যেকোনো সমস্যা সম্পর্কে আমাদের এখানে ইমেল করতে পারেন - shivangcare@gmail.com

Starting me easy laga tha, phir game ne dimag ghooma diya 😭

Watch till the end to see if we actually escape or not 👀

Also 25K likes for Part 2 😎

Laamba Laamba Ghoonghat Kaahe Ko Daala

Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup

Raat Kiya Re Tune Kaisa Ghotala

Vo Bahanoi Tha Bahanoi Thahara 
Kyon Na Pahachaana Toone Piya Ji Ka Chehara 
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Bahanoi Ne Odh Rakhi Thi Chaadar
Rakhi Thi Chaadar Rakhi Thi Chaadar
Main Samajhi Piya Ka Hai Bistar
Piya Ka Hai Bistar Piya Ka Hai Bistar
Aadhe Bistar Pe Vo Soya Tha
Aadhe Pe Main So Gai

Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi

Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi

Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Deepak Ataari Pe Jalata Toh Hoga
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup

Apano Paraayo Nazar Na Aayo 
Bhool Kaise Ho Gai Tujhase Dulariya

Padate Hi Bistar Pe So Gai

snippet.title: Lalitha Sahasranama Stotram Telugu Lyrics | శ్రీ లలితా సహస్రనామం  | Powerful Lalitha Devi Stotra
snippet.description:
Lalitha Sahasranama Stotram Telugu Lyrics | శ్రీ లలితా సహస్రనామం  | Powerful Lalitha Devi Stotra  


Immerse yourself in the divine grace of Goddess Lalitha Tripura Sundari with this sacred Lalitha Sahasranama Stotram with Telugu Lyrics. This powerful stotra consists of the thousand holy names of Lalitha Devi, each describing her supreme beauty, and boundless compassion.

Chanting or listening to Lalitha Sahasranama regularly is believed to bring peace of mind, prosperity, protection from negative energies, and spiritual upliftment. With clear Telugu lyrics included, devotees can easily follow along and experience the divine vibrations.

#LalithaSahasranama #LalithaDeviSongs #TeluguDevotionalSongs #BhaktiSongs #DeviStotram #LalithaSongs

snippet.title: #Video #मगही | गोली चोली पर चलतौ | #RajeevYadav, #Khushi Kakkar | #Maghi #RangdariNew Song 2026
snippet.description:
🎶 गोली चोली पर चलतौ | New Maghi Song 2026 🎶

Presenting the brand new Maghi धमाका "गोली चोली पर चलतौ" in the powerful voices of Rajeev Yadav & Khushi Kakkar. This song brings pure desi swag, rangdari vibes, and high-energy beats that will make you groove instantly! 💥🔥

अगर आपको मगही गानों का देसी अंदाज़, दमदार लिरिक्स और जबरदस्त म्यूजिक पसंद है, तो ये गाना आपके लिए ही है।

👉 Song Credits:
Singer: Rajeev Yadav, Khushi Kakkar
Language: Maghi
Genre: Rangdari / Desi Folk

snippet.title: Ee Manase Full Video Song | Ustaad Bhagat Singh | Pawan Kalyan, Sreeleela | Harish Shankar
snippet.description:
Fall in love with the soulful melody “Ee Manase Se Se” from Ustaad Bhagat Singh, starring Power Star Pawan Kalyan and the sensational Sreeleela.

This romantic masterpiece captures the essence of love, emotions, and connection through mesmerizing visuals and heartfelt music 💖

The evergreen voice of S. P. Balasubrahmanyam adds soul to this track, while music director Deva delivers a timeless melody. The poetic brilliance of Sirivennala Seetharama Sastry makes every line unforgettable.

Directed by Harish Shankar, this song blends modern visuals with classic romantic vibes, making it a must-watch for every Telugu music lover.

#EeManaseSeSe #UstaadBhagatSingh #PawanKalyan #Sreeleela #SPB #SPBalasubrahmanyam #DevaMusic #Sirivennala #HarishShankar #TeluguSongs #TeluguLoveSongs #RomanticSongs #Tollywood #LahariMusic #MelodySongs #TeluguMelody #LoveSongTelugu #TrendingTeluguSongs #4KTeluguSongs #NewTeluguSongs #toliprema

Listen to Sai Baba & Raghavendra Swamy Manasasmarami in Kannada, a powerful devotional song dedicated to Guruvara (Thursday).

Audio Credits

►Label / Company: Bhaigiri Music


Lyrics :-

Female 
लेजा तेरी अंगूठी ले जाइयो कंगना 2 

male 
दूसरे की मेहंदी लगाई हाथ में - 
2
नींद आवे न आवे मौक़ू रात में -2

Female 
मेरे खुदा तेरी कैसी खुदाई 
हो गई पराई में तो,हो गई पराई 

कैसे भुलाऊं तेरो प्यार सजना- 2

लेजा तेरी अंगूठी ले जाइयो कंगना -2

तेल चढ़ेगो फिर चढ़ जावे हल्दी 
एक बार आजा मोसे,मिलवे को जल्दी -2

कैसे भुलाऊं तेरो आवे सपना - 2

लेजा तेरी अंगूठी ले जाइयो कंगना 

Male
बाजे रे डीजे तेरे नाचे बराती 
2पेक देजा मोकु नीद आ जाती- 2

चल रहे पटाखे तेरी बारात में - 2
नीद आवे न आवे मौक़ू रात में - 2
............

Female 
Leja teri anghuti le jaeyo kangna -2

Male 
Dusare ki mahndhi lagai hath me -2

Nid aawe na aawe moku raat me -2 

Female 
Mere khuda teri kesi khudai 
Ho gai parai me to ho gai parai 

Kese bhulau tero pyar sajna - 2

Leja teri anghuti le jaeyo kangna 

Tel chadego fir chad jawe haldi 
Ak baar aaja mose milve ko jaldi -2

Kese bhulau tero aawe sapna -2

Leja teri anghuti le jaeyo kangna 

Male 
Baje re DJ tere nache brati 
2pak deja moku nid aa jati -2

Chal rhe ptakhe teri barat me -2
Nid aawe na aawe moku raat me -2
.......
